strengths: Extensive full-stack experience spanning over 15 years, significantly exceeding the 6+ years requirement, with deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React.
Direct, recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows, directly fulfilling a niche job requirement.
Strong engineering and architectural fundamentals with a demonstrated commitment to test-driven development (TDD), cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK), and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
concerns: Lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest/Playwright, which are key components of the specified primary tech stack.
Does not list experience with Kotlin or Python, despite the job description requesting proficiency in these secondary languages.
Recent professional experience leans heavily toward NoSQL (MongoDB), with less recent emphasis on relational databases like PostgreSQL.
response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer position. He brings over 15 years of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6-year requirement, and aligns perfectly with the core TypeScript, Node.js, and React stack. Furthermore, his recent work explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure, directly satisfying a highly specific and modern requirement of the role. While he lacks explicit mentions of Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin, his profound architectural knowledge, strong testing background, and extensive polyglot experience suggest he will adapt rapidly and excel as a senior individual contributor.
